scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && source ../.env && forge clean && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default --broadcast --verify --etherscan-api-key $ETHERSCAN_API_KEY
scripts.approve:sepolia: cd contracts && source ../.env && cast send $ENS_REGISTRY_ADDRESS "setApprovalForAll(address,bool)" $VITE_REGISTRAR_ADDRESS true --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: cd contracts && source ../.env && forge clean && forge script script/DeployCrochethL2Registrar.s.sol --rpc-url base_sepolia --account default --broadcast --verify --etherscan-api-key $ETHERSCAN_API_KEY
scripts.registrar:approve: cd contracts && . ../.env && cast send $L2_REGISTRY_ADDRESS "addRegistrar(address)" $VITE_L2_REGISTRAR_ADDRESS --rpc-url https://sepolia.base.org --account default
scripts.durin:set-resolver: cd contracts && . ../.env && NODE=$(cast keccak $(cast abi-encode "f(bytes32,bytes32)" $(cast namehash "eth") $(cast keccak "croch"))) && cast send $ENS_REGISTRY_ADDRESS "setResolver(bytes32,address)" $NODE 0x8A968aB9eb8C084FBC44c531058Fc9ef945c3D61 --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default
scripts.durin:set-registry: cd contracts && . ../.env && NODE=$(cast keccak $(cast abi-encode "f(bytes32,bytes32)" $(cast namehash "eth") $(cast keccak "croch"))) && cast send 0x8A968aB9eb8C084FBC44c531058Fc9ef945c3D61 "setL2Registry(bytes32,uint64,address)" $NODE 84532 $L2_REGISTRY_ADDRESS --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default
scripts.codegen: cd contracts && forge build && cd ../app && bunx wagmi generate
scripts.backend: cd local && set -a; . ../.env; set +a; bun run index.ts
